tasks.subject: Task 1: P1b — physics_model_version stamp (constant, artifact field, loader warning)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Artifacts record which physics model they were fitted against; the loader warns (never errors) on mismatch; the bump policy is documented. First step creates branch `feat/p7-phase-center-auto-refocus` off `main`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs` (new `PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION: u32 = 1` constant with bump-policy doc comment)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/data/types.rs` (`CalibrationMetadata` field ~:163 with `#[serde(default)]`, `CalibrationMetadataBuilder` ~:987-1090)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/data/loader.rs` (warn after format_version check :165-170; pure helper `physics_model_version_mismatch(artifact, current) -> Option<String>`; tests)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs` (`CalibrationMetadata` struct literal at :243 stamps `PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION`)
- Modify: `calibrate/src/artifact_export.rs` (builder chain :339 adds `.physics_model_version(PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION)`)
- Modify: `calibrate/src/boresight_calibration.rs` (builder chain :653, same)
- Modify: `docs/calibration-workflow-guide.md` (new "Physics-model versioning" section: 3 version axes, cross-ref roadmap D2)
- Compile errors reveal remaining `CalibrationMetadata { … }` struct literals (types.rs tests) → add `physics_model_version: 0`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `pub const PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION: u32` in model/mod.rs with bump policy + history list.
- `CalibrationMetadata.physics_model_version: u32` (`#[serde(default)]`, 0 = unknown/pre-stamp).
- Both calibrate writers + repository design-spec path stamp the constant.
- Loader warns naming BOTH values via the pure helper; unit tests (mismatch→Some w/ both numbers; match→None; 0→Some).
- Round-trip test: artifact encoded with version 999 loads Ok, preserves value (warn, not error).
- calibration-workflow-guide.md documents the axis vs ANTC header u32 (container) and format_version string (schema).
- `cargo test --workspace` green.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model physics_model_version` then `cargo test --workspace` → all pass.

**Steps:** (full code in plan doc `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-10-p7-phase-center-auto-refocus.md` Task 1)
1. `git checkout main && git pull && git checkout -b feat/p7-phase-center-auto-refocus`
2. Add constant (code in plan). 3. Write failing loader tests (code in plan) — red = compile error. 4. Add metadata field + builder. 5. Loader helper + warn call. 6. Stamp at 3 construction sites. 7. Tests green. 8. Docs section. 9. Commit (message in plan; note bincode layout break, no .bin artifacts exist).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/data/types.rs", "antenna-model/src/data/loader.rs", "antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs", "calibrate/src/artifact_export.rs", "calibrate/src/boresight_calibration.rs", "docs/calibration-workflow-guide.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION constant with bump policy doc", "metadata field serde(default) u32, 0=unknown", "3 construction sites stamp it", "loader warns naming both values, never errors", "mismatched-fixture round-trip test passes", "workflow guide documents 3 version axes", "cargo test --workspace green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Model-layer auto-refocus — axial_defocus field, defocus expression, version bump
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `phase_center_offset` stops contributing to the aperture defocus phase; new `axial_defocus` field carries deliberate defocus through the identical math; `PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION` bumps to 2.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/model/geometry.rs` (`FeedParameters` struct :173-193 gains `#[serde(default)] pub axial_defocus: f64`; `new()` :197-211 keeps 4-arg signature, inits 0.0; builder :300-357 gains `axial_defocus()` method)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs` (:523-527 → `position.z - focal_length + config.feed.axial_defocus`; tests :990-1022 reworked)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs` (constant → 2, history line for P7)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/model/edge_cases.rs` (:332, :356 test struct literals gain `axial_defocus: 0.0`)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/model/ray_trace.rs` (:306 same)
- Modify: `docs/domain-contract.md` (glossary :76 minimal same-commit edit: "Implemented 2026-07-10 (P7)")

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `FeedParameters.axial_defocus` exists (serde default; default 0.0 in new()/builder); `new()` signature unchanged.
- Defocus term reads `position.z − focal_length + axial_defocus`; `phase_center_offset` nowhere in phase computation.
- `test_axial_defocus_produces_defocus_loss`: 5 cm axial_defocus costs >1 dB at 8.4 GHz.
- `test_phase_center_offset_alone_produces_no_defocus_loss`: 5 cm pco, zero defocus → |Δgain| < 1e-9 dB vs focused.
- `PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION` = 2 with P7 history line.
- `cargo test --workspace` green; only legitimate change = harness residuals improve for dsn_34m_uncalibrated (nonzero pco in yaml). Any other numeric failure → STOP and investigate (standing rule 4), do not adjust assertions.
- HARD CONSTRAINT: never touch lateral/steering math or sign conventions — axial expression only.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model model::integration` → PASS; `cargo test -p antenna-model --test reference_validation reference_residuals -- --nocapture` → dsn_34m Ka residual ≈ −0.1 dB (was −3.40); `cargo test --workspace` → green.

**Steps:** (full code in plan doc Task 2)
1. Write the two failing tests replacing `test_phase_center_offset_produces_defocus_loss` (full code in plan). 2. Add field + docs + builder method (code in plan). Fix struct-literal fixtures. 3. Swap defocus term with auto-refocus comment. 4. Bump constant to 2. 5. Model tests, workspace tests, capture new harness residual table for Task 4. 6. Minimal contract glossary edit same commit. 7. Commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/geometry.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/edge_cases.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/ray_trace.rs", "docs/domain-contract.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace && cargo test -p antenna-model --test reference_validation reference_residuals -- --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["axial_defocus field with serde default, new() signature unchanged", "defocus term uses axial_defocus not phase_center_offset", "axial_defocus 0.05m costs >1dB at 8.4GHz (test)", "pco 0.05m alone changes gain <1e-9 dB (test)", "PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION=2", "workspace green, dsn_34m Ka residual ~-0.1dB", "no lateral/steering math touched"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Data/service plumbing — axial_defocus_m from YAML to the model
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deliberate defocus is expressible end-to-end (YAML design spec → data layer → evaluator/h3 → model); `phase_center_offset_m` in configs is provably inert at the service level.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/data/types.rs` (data-layer `FeedParameters` :394-404 gains `#[serde(default)] pub axial_defocus_m: f64`; builder :1252-1283 gains method)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/config/settings.rs` (`FeedSpecConfig` :400-418 gains `#[serde(default)] pub axial_defocus_m: f64`; tests)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs` (feed literal :221-229 passes `feed_spec.axial_defocus_m`)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs` (builder chain :182-187 adds `.axial_defocus(calibration.physical_config.feed.axial_defocus_m)`; new tests)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs` (builder chain :105, same)
- Modify: `calibrate/src/artifact_export.rs` (:285-289 literal gains `axial_defocus_m: 0.0` + comment; test :543), `calibrate/src/boresight_calibration.rs` (:591, :724), `calibrate/src/main.rs` (:697)
- Compile errors reveal remaining data-FeedParameters literals (batch.rs:251, heatmap.rs:644,747, h3_link_budget.rs:651, evaluator.rs:504,1400, repository/loader tests) → `axial_defocus_m: 0.0`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Data field + builder method exist; `FeedSpecConfig.axial_defocus_m` parses from YAML, defaults 0 when absent (test both).
- repository/evaluator/h3 thread the value through.
- Service test: identical calibrations differing only in `phase_center_offset_m` (0.0 vs 0.02) → bit-identical gain_db (`assert_eq!`).
- Service test: `axial_defocus_m: 0.05` → gain lower by >0.5 dB.
- calibrate writers stamp `axial_defocus_m: 0.0` explicitly with one-line comment (CLI doesn't expose it; do NOT extend ExportPhysicalParams unless compiler forces).
- `cargo test --workspace` green.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model service:: config:: data::` and `cargo test --workspace` → PASS.

**Steps:** (full code in plan doc Task 3, incl. `gain_with_feed_mutation` helper + both service tests + settings yaml tests)
1. Failing settings test (yaml absent→0.0, explicit→preserved; adapt deserialization to neighboring tests' style). 2. Add config + data fields (code in plan). 3. Thread through repository/evaluator/h3/calibrate; sweep compile errors. 4. Service-level tests via `compute_gain_from_request` pattern (full code in plan). 5. `cargo test --workspace`. 6. Commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/data/types.rs", "antenna-model/src/config/settings.rs", "antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs", "calibrate/src/artifact_export.rs", "calibrate/src/boresight_calibration.rs", "calibrate/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["axial_defocus_m in data FeedParameters + builder + FeedSpecConfig with serde default", "repository/evaluator/h3 thread value to model builder", "pco_m 0 vs 0.02 -> bit-identical service gain (test)", "axial_defocus_m 0.05 -> gain lower >0.5dB (test)", "yaml parse test absent->0 and explicit->preserved", "workspace green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tighten reference tolerances; update config/fixture commentary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The harness actually guards Ka-band: dsn_34m tolerances drop (Ka 5.0 → 1.5 dB, X 1.5 → 1.0 dB); fixture/yaml comments describe post-P7 reality.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/tests/fixtures/reference_datasets/dsn_34m_bwg.psv` (tolerance column on both rows + `tolerance_db notes` comment block + stale "fix deferred" header caveats)
- Modify: `antenna-model/tests/reference_validation.rs` (module-doc "Known open item: Ka-band phase-center defocus" → resolved-by-P7 note)
- Modify: `calibration_data/antennas.yaml` (reference-section comment :243-244 — pco no longer a required-zero workaround, values inert under auto-refocus, point at axial_defocus_m; adjust dsn_70m/gbt `# focused` inline comments)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- psv: X tolerance_db = 1.0, Ka = 1.5; comment block rewritten with ACTUAL post-P7 residuals from the harness run (not predictions; baseline pre-P7 was X −0.62 / Ka −3.40).
- Harness green with tightened tolerances; |Ka residual| ≲ 0.2 dB, |X| ≲ 0.3 dB expected. FALLBACK: if X residual > ~0.5 dB, keep X at 1.5 (roadmap: tighten X "if the residual supports it") and record why in the fixture comment.
- antennas.yaml comment updated (template in plan doc); dsn_34m_uncalibrated's datasheet values (0.02/0.015/0.008) STAY — now honest inert metadata + live proof of auto-refocus in the harness.
- Roadmap stretch (second multi-band reference antenna) intentionally NOT implemented — rationale: dsn_34m nonzero offsets at X+Ka under tight tolerances + GBT L/Q rows (1.4–43 GHz) already evidence cross-D/λ generalization. Recorded in roadmap by Task 5.
- `cargo test --workspace` green.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model --test reference_validation -- --nocapture --test-threads=1` → all rows ok with new tolerances; `cargo test --workspace` → green.

**Steps:**
1. Run harness, capture actual dsn_34m X/Ka residuals. 2. Edit psv tolerances + comment block (template with <X_RESID>/<KA_RESID> slots in plan doc — fill with measured values). 3. Update reference_validation.rs module doc. 4. Update antennas.yaml comments (yaml text in plan doc). 5. Harness + workspace green. 6. Commit, pasting the new residual table into the commit body.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/tests/fixtures/reference_datasets/dsn_34m_bwg.psv", "antenna-model/tests/reference_validation.rs", "calibration_data/antennas.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --test reference_validation -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 && cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Ka tolerance 5.0->1.5, X 1.5->1.0 (or 1.5 kept with recorded rationale if residual >0.5dB)", "comment blocks carry actual measured residuals", "harness green with tightened tolerances", "antennas.yaml comments reflect auto-refocus semantics", "dsn_34m datasheet pco values retained", "workspace green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Docs truth pass — contract, findings, roadmap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every document describing `phase_center_offset` semantics or P7/P1b status matches the shipped code. Docs-only commit.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/domain-contract.md` (glossary row :76 rewritten; NEW glossary row for `axial_defocus`/`axial_defocus_m`; open-items bullet :187-192)
- Modify: `docs/findings-2026-07-10-ka-phase-center-defocus.md` (Status header → Implemented (P7) 2026-07-10; follow-up items 2–4 done, item 5 marked not-needed with rationale)
- Modify: `docs/roadmap-2026-07.md` (register row P7 gains "IMPLEMENTED 2026-07-10" note + commit hashes; §7 risk bullet "Loose Ka reference tolerance until P7 lands" → resolved)
- Modify: `docs/roadmap-2026-07-work-units.md` (P1b + P7 get repo-conventional "✅ DONE <date> — <commits>" header lines; stretch-criterion disposition recorded; note P1b implemented in same branch)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Glossary: phase_center_offset = compensated feed property (auto-refocus, P7, implemented), no gain effect, pinned by `test_phase_center_offset_alone_produces_no_defocus_loss`; new axial_defocus row (deliberate defocus, meters, positive away from vertex, default 0, consumed at integration.rs feed_axial_offset).
- Open-items bullet updated AND corrects the stale claim that `illumination::phase_center_offset_phase` exists as dead code (already removed — grep-verified 2026-07-10, zero hits).
- Findings doc status flipped; follow-ups checked off (2: fix applied, 3: tolerance tightened, 4: q-truncation already fixed, 5: not needed — see roadmap note).
- Roadmap register + risks + work-units updated per convention.
- Docs-only: `git diff --stat` shows no source changes; workspace still green.

**Verify:** `grep -rn "Not yet implemented" docs/domain-contract.md` → no P7-related hits; `grep -n "phase_center_offset_phase" docs/domain-contract.md` → only as "removed" history; `git diff main --stat -- '*.rs'` limited to Tasks 1-4 changes.

**Steps:**
1. Contract glossary + open items (keep table format, keep historical Ka pointer). 2. Findings doc status + follow-up checklist. 3. Roadmap register/risks + work-units DONE headers with real commit hashes from this branch. 4. Commit `docs(P7): record auto-refocus implementation in contract, findings, roadmap`.
